calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Sep-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Virma Acevido'S Motion To Compel Arbitration (For Entry Of Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frank fox, Esq. 619-234-1000 of Majors & Fox for Plaintiff Ana Garcia.
Mark Wraight, Esq. 415-398-3344 of Severson & Werson for Defendant WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., VIRMA ACEVIDO.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff argues meeting of the minds argument and substantive unconscionabilty.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., VIRMA ACEVIDO's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Defendants Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. and Virma Acevedo's motion to compel arbitration is granted and this case is stayed pending conclusion of the arbitration proceedings. (see word minutes for full details.)

Counsel for Wells Fargo to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling with the additional language on interrogatories and depositions in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
